data.title: Create ticket-lib-api.sh: sourceable library with _ticketlib_dispatch and ticket_show
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to Create
New file: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh

## Sourceability Contract (enforced from day one)
- NO set -euo pipefail at library scope (callers may have strict mode; library must not override it)
- NO exit calls from library functions — use return instead
- NO trap EXIT at library scope — use subshell ( ... ) for any local trap needs
- NO mutation of GIT_DIR, GIT_INDEX_FILE, GIT_WORK_TREE, GIT_COMMON_DIR
- Function namespace: _ticketlib_ prefix or ticket_ prefix (avoid shadowing caller-side names)

## Functions to Implement
1. _ticketlib_dispatch <op> <args...>
   - Wraps each sourced call in a subshell: ( "$op" "$@" )
   - Isolates library-function side effects from dispatcher shell
   - Returns the subshell exit code to the caller

2. ticket_show [--format=<fmt>] <ticket_id>
   - Ports all logic from plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-show.sh
   - Uses return (not exit) for error paths
   - Invokes python3 reducer inline (same as ticket-show.sh does)
   - Handles DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1: if set, exec the original ticket-show.sh instead
   - Handles TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR and PROJECT_ROOT env vars

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh exists and is executable (chmod +x)
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] Library has no set -euo pipefail at file scope (functions may use local strict mode)
  Verify: ! grep -n "^set -euo pipefail" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] Library has no exit calls outside subshell contexts (uses return)
  Verify: ! grep -nP "(?<!\\))(\bexit\b)" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh | grep -v "subshell\|( exit\|( " | grep -v "^.*#"
- [ ] _ticketlib_dispatch is defined and wraps in subshell
  Verify: grep -q "_ticketlib_dispatch" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] ticket_show function is defined
  Verify: grep -q "^ticket_show" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] Sourceability test passes: test_ticketlib_api_sourceability_strict_mode
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "PASS.*sourceability"
- [ ] JSON parity test passes: test_ticket_show_via_library_returns_correct_json
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "PASS.*library_returns_correct_json"
